description: Output of L5 TRUST RECONCILE (A1's headline deliverable, trust_scores.json). A2's L6 (Arbitrate + Precedence) and L8 (Mesh, edge weights) consume this directly.

trust_score.description: Calibrated probability from the fitted logistic regression (or documented fallback prior).

is_finding.description: Ground-truth label used during training only, kept for audit trail. Not meaningful at inference time on unlabeled real data.

label_source.description: Which findings_labels.csv subtype (or 'unmatched_implicit_negative') produced this pair's training label.
